since_last: 76% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.08%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 76% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -1.97% · Gold -2.12% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 76% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.08%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.08%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.15%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SPCX is the standout at -16.83%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +8.23%, MRVL +5.72%, MU +5.44%, LRCX +5.30%, LSCC +5.09%. Laggards: SPCX -16.83%, IBM -4.12%, WDAY -1.13%, INTU -1.01%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -16.83% at $159.54
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -16.83% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
